title: The Kingâs Avatar Season 2 Episode 6 Subbed
description:
Widely regarded as a pioneer and top professional player in the online multiplayer game Glory, Ye Xiu was nicknamed "Battle God" for his skills and contribution to the game over the years. However, when forced to retire from the team and abandon his gaming career, he found work at a nearby internet cafe. There, when Glory launches its tenth server, he once again throws himself into the game using a new character named "Lord Grim."

Ye Xiu's early achievements on the new server soon caught the attention of many players, as well as the big guilds, making them wonder about the identity of this remarkable player. However, while he has 10 years of experience and deep knowledge, starting from scratch without a sponsor or team in the game that has changed over the years presents many challenges. Along with his talented new colleagues, Ye Xiu once again dedicated himself to crossing the road to the top of Glory!
The Kingâs Avatar Season 2, Quanzhi Gaoshou
